  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    ActivationFunctions
    Provides common activation functions and their derivatives for use in neural network layers.
    DataHandler
    Utility class for handling dataset loading, splitting, and exporting training metrics and ROC data from a (almost always) provided SimpleNN model.
    DataHandler.DataSet
    Container for raw input features and corresponding class labels.
    DataHandler.SplitData
    Container for split training and test datasets.
    Main
    The Main class is the main point for training/evaluating/plotting results of a neural network model.
    Metrics
    Provides basic evaluation metrics for binary classification.
    ModelBase
    Abstract base class for neural network models.
    NNUtils
    Utility class for common neural network operations such as matrix-vector multiplication, loss computation, and argmax.
    SimpleNN
    A basic feedforward neural network that supports backpropagation, batch training, several hidden layers, and recording evaluation metrics.
    SimpleNN.EvaluationResult
    A simple container for evaluation results including loss, accuracy, precision, and recall.
    TrainConfig
    Configurator for setting main parameters for training, like: architecture of hidden layers, epochs of training, ...
    TrainingLogger
    Utility class for logging training progress and results to the console during model training.
